signals.title: PDF-to-Podcast SaaS wrapper
signals.thesis: AI-native workflow for converting any PDF into a polished podcast episode. 3 competitors but none with our tech stack advantage.

signals.title: Micro-SaaS for freelancer invoicing
signals.thesis: Freelancers hate QuickBooks. Simple, beautiful invoicing with AI-generated payment reminders and tax categorization.

signals.title: AI social proof aggregator
signals.thesis: Automatically collect and display testimonials, reviews, and case studies from across platforms. Widget-based embed.

signals.title: Automated competitor pricing tracker
signals.thesis: Real-time monitoring of competitor pricing changes with AI-generated positioning recommendations.

signals.title: AI meeting summarizer for Slack
signals.thesis: Auto-join meetings, generate summaries, action items, and post to relevant Slack channels. Zoom + Google Meet integration.

signals.title: Content repurposing engine
signals.thesis: One piece of content → 12 formats. Blog to thread to carousel to video script to newsletter. We proved this works internally.

signals.title: No-code API connector for non-devs
signals.thesis: Zapier but for people who can't even use Zapier. Natural language API configuration.

signals.title: AI-powered brand voice consistency checker
signals.thesis: Upload brand guidelines, get real-time feedback on whether content matches your voice. Plugin for Google Docs + Notion.

signals.title: Startup due diligence automation
signals.thesis: Automate 80% of VC due diligence: market sizing, competitor mapping, team background checks, financial modeling.

signals.title: Automated newsletter growth system
signals.thesis: End-to-end newsletter automation: content generation, A/B subject lines, subscriber segmentation, referral program. Proved 340% growth internally.

signals.title: AI-powered customer success playbooks
signals.thesis: Generate personalized onboarding and success playbooks for each customer based on their usage patterns and goals.

signals.title: Real-time sentiment analysis dashboard
signals.thesis: Track brand sentiment across social platforms, forums, and review sites. AI-powered crisis detection with auto-response drafts.

signals.title: Automated design system generator
signals.thesis: Feed it your brand assets and get a complete design system: tokens, components, documentation. Figma + code export.

signals.title: Smart contract template marketplace
signals.thesis: Pre-audited smart contract templates for common business operations. Too early? Maybe. But the TAM is massive.

signals.title: PodCast Forge — AI podcast production suite
signals.thesis: Our own product. Record → edit → publish → distribute → monetize. All AI-powered. Already generating revenue.
